nasb.text: Let every valley be lifted up, And every mountain and hill be made low; And let the rough ground become a plain, And the rugged terrain a broad valley;

esv.text: Every valley shall be lifted up, and every mountain and hill be made low; the uneven ground shall become level, and the rough places a plain.

cnv.text: 一切深谷都要填滿， 一切山岡都要削平； 險峻的要改為平地， 崎嶇的要改為平原。

ccb.text: 一切山谷将被填满， 大山小丘将被削平； 坎坷之地将变得平坦， 崎岖的地面将成为平原。

csbs.text: 一切山谷将被升高， 一切山冈将被降低， 高高低低的成为平地， 崎崎岖岖的成为平原。
